steps.text: Translate the word description: $f$ gives the product of $x$ and a number that is $84$ more than $x$. The second factor is $x + 84$.
Expand by distributing: $f(x) = x \cdot x + x \cdot 84 = x^2 + 84x$.

Evaluate all choices:
  • A: $f(x) = x^2 + x + 84$ - has an extra $+84$ constant and uses $+x$ instead of $+84x$. This is not the product of $x$ and $x+84$. Eliminated.
  • B: $f(x) = x^2 + 84$ - missing the $84x$ term; this would equal $x^2$ plus a constant, not a product of two linear expressions in $x$. Eliminated.
  • C: $f(x) = x^2 + 84x$ - matches $x(x+84)$ exactly. That confirms C is correct.
  • D: $f(x) = x^2 + 84x + 84$ - has an extra constant $+84$ that does not appear in the product. Eliminated.
